basic_details.job_title: CARI Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 17 Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate-1, Project Research Scientist I, Project Technical Support III
basic_details.short_information: Central Ayurveda Research Institute has released the official Senior Research Fellow, Research Associate-1, Project Research Scientist I, and Project Technical Support III Notification 2026 on various walk-in dates at CARI Official Website. A total of 17 vacancies have been announced under the CARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years for most posts and 40 years for Research Associate-1 with qualifications including B.A.M.S., M.D./M.S. (Ayurveda), M.Pharm, M.Sc., M.V.Sc., and Ph.D. in relevant fields can attend the walk-in interviews scheduled between 23-05-2

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for most posts, Max 40 years for Research Associate-1
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for most posts. Maximum age limit is 40 years for Research Associate-1. Age relaxation will be provided as per Govt. of India rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.A.M.S., M.D./M.S. (Ayurveda), M.Pharm (Pharmacognosy), M.Sc. (Botany/Medicinal Plants/Biotechnology/Life Science), M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology), M.Pharm (Pharmacology), Ph.D. in relevant field, M.Sc. (Zoology)
qualification.details: Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda): B.A.M.S. Degree from any Recognized University. Preference for M.D./M.S. (Ayurveda) or experience in AYUSH/CCRAS funded projects. Skills in drafting scientific documents and computer applications. Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacognosy/Botany): M.Pharm in Pharmacognosy / MS Natural Products / M.Pharm (Ay) OR M.Sc. Botany/Medicinal Plants/Biotechnology/Life Science with two years research experience. Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacology): M.V.Sc. (Pharmacology) / M.Pharm / M.S. (Pharmacology) / M.Pharm (Ay) / M.Sc. (Medicinal Plants) with specialization in Pharmacology/Biochemistry/Biotechnology with 02 years experience. Desirable: Experience in laboratory animal handling. Research Associate-1: First class degree in MD/M.V.Sc/M.Pharm in Pharmacology / M.Pharm (Ay) / M.Sc. (Medicinal Plants) with Ph.D. and at least one research paper in Science Citation Indexed Journal. Project Research Scientist I: First class degree in MD/M.V.Sc (Pharmacology) / M.Pharm (Pharmacology) / M.Pharm (Ay) / M.Sc. (Medicinal Plants) OR Second class Post graduate degree with Ph.D. Minimum three years experience in Pharmacological screening and Toxicological testing. Project Technical Support III: Graduate in Zoology with three years experience OR Postgraduate in Zoology with one year experience in any research laboratory. Desirable: Experience in toxicology/Histopathology or preclinical toxicology laboratories and animal handling. Senior Research Fellow (Pharmacognosy/Phytochemistry): M.Pharmacy (Pharmacognosy) / M.Pharmacy (Pharmacognosy and Phytochemistry) / M.S. Natural Products. Desirable: Experience in In-Silico studies, HPLC/HPTLC, microscopic studies and article writing in SCI journals.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies announced by CARI for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Central Ayurveda Research Institute (CARI) has announced a total of 17 vacancies for the posts of Senior Research Fellow and other related positions.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for CARI Recruitment 2026 is Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview directly at the specified venue and time.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow post ranges from Rs. 42,000/- p.m. plus 30% HRA, depending on the specific project and qualifications.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurveda) post, candidates need a B.A.M.S. Degree. Preference will be given to those with M.D./M.S. (Ayurveda) or relevant experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for CARI Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the Research Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Associate-1 position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Central Ayurveda Research Institute, Kolkata, West Bengal, 700091.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates, along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations available for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation will be provided as per the Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC candidates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test, Interview, and Document Verification.
